user.title: Set up VentWise
user.description: Choose your room sensors and comfort settings. You can change these later in the integration settings.

data_description.target_temperature_c: The comfort temperature VentWise should aim for indoors.
data_description.soft_outdoor_threshold_c: Above this temperature outside, opening windows becomes less useful.
data_description.minimum_score: VentWise only recommends ventilation when the score reaches this value.
data_description.cooldown_minutes: How long VentWise waits before sending the same suggestion again.
data_description.stability_minutes: How long a suggestion must remain unchanged before it can be sent.
data_description.quiet_hours_enabled: Stop recommendations while quiet hours are active.
data_description.wind_speed_entity_id: Optional. Pick a wind speed sensor if you have one.
data_description.master_control_entity_id: Optional. Pick the switch or helper you want to use as a master control.
data_description.notification_device_id: Optional. Pick the device that should receive notifications.
data_description.room_count: How many rooms you want to configure.

room.title: Room {current_room} of {room_count}
room.description: Configure one room at a time.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room, like Bedroom or Study.
data_description.weight: Use a higher weight for rooms that matter more.

error.invalid_input: One or more values are invalid.

init.title: Adjust VentWise
init.description: Update shared settings and the number of rooms.
